title: AEO partnership chat — funnel design with collaborator (Diddles)
html:
Long iMessage thread between Yahir and "Diddles" working out the aeo agency go-to-market in real time. Yahir is shifting focus heavily to AEO because the path "seems too obvious," and they're trying to crack the appointment-setting funnel for skeptical local-business owners. The conversation moves from selling-the-meta-game (you're invisible to AI search), to demoing visible "before/after" code+visual updates on screen-share, to closing tactics ("assume the sale, get their card"), to hard problems: how to filter quality leads from Yahir's existing scraping pipeline, and whether to do high-touch per-prospect work or mass cold blast.

TL;DR

  • aeo agency pivot crystallizing — Yahir & diddles explicitly say "the path seems too obvious" and want to go all-in on AEO for local SMBs.
  • The hard problem isn't closing — it's getting on the call. Yahir's business scraping pipeline gets website + phone + extracted email but routes to non-decision-maker inboxes.
  • Funnel design under debate: text-blast → AI cold-call → missed-call marketing → simple appointment-set funnel; Diddles will close on the call, Yahir does the backend.
  • Pricing thesis emerging: business owners with personal # on Google Business Profile = low-ticket ($0 upfront, ~$100/mo); proposed offer = "first 2 weeks free, then $99/month."
  • Sales narrative seed: 2-week free trial + analytics + projections — same shape that becomes the Insight AI funnel design Yahir sketches five days later.

Key quote

"Just creating content (not to post) but to show them visuals on how turning optimizing your online presence to cater toward AI presence is massive."

Why it matters in the graph

This is the exact September→October bridge in the AI search thesis. The Sept-22 $45/mo offer draft was the solo version; this is when Diddles becomes a partner and the offer scales to $99/mo with a 2-week-free hook. Five days later Yahir sketches insight ai as the productized expression of this exact funnel. Two days after that he discovers peekaboo doing the same thing professionally.

Open questions

  • Is "Diddles" a recurring collaborator the vault should disambiguate (real name?) — currently a single-mention nickname.
  • Did the AI-cold-call path ever ship, or did the telnyx Toll-Free Verification saga (Oct 21 → Nov 4) kill that channel?
